title: Catalog Entry
description: A dashboard or panel entry in the awesome-sdlc-dashboards catalog

title.description: Display name shown on the card

kind.description: Whether this is a full dashboard or an individual panel

source.description: Where it comes from: github, grafana, datadog, cdviz, prometheus, ...

links.description: Typed URLs associated with this entry

tags.description: Keywords for search and filtering. Use topic:<domain> for high-level classification.

images.description: Paths to screenshot images relative to the entry directory

related_dashboard.description: Slug of the parent dashboard (for panel entries)

description.description: Markdown description of what this dashboard/panel shows and why it is useful
